## Overview

> Virtual reality movie watching experience on the web.

**Movie Virtual Theater** is an advanced general system engineered by **Karthik Idikuda**. 

<br/>

## System Architecture

```mermaid
graph LR;
    A["Input"] --> B["Core Engine"];
    B --> C{"Algorithm"};
    C --> D["Output"];

    style A fill:#1a0f00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
    style B fill:#2d1a00,stroke:#ffa657,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff
```

<br/>

## Project Structure

```
Movie-Virtual-Theater/
  .gitignore
  LICENSE
  README.md
```

<br/>

- **NO PERMISSION** to use, copy, modify, or distribute without written consent.
